overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort MidCap400 (MZZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 index. The fund provides -2x exposure to a market cap-weighted index of 400 US mid-cap companies. MZZ was launched on Jul 11, 2006 and is issued by ProShares.
